      "outputs": [],
      "source": [
        "import numpy as np\n",
        "import matplotlib.pyplot as plt"
      ]
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "np.random.seed(42)\n",
        "X = np.linspace(-3, 3, 100).reshape(-1, 1) #sample,features\n",
        "y = np.sin(X).ravel() + np.random.normal(scale=0.1, size=X.shape[0]) #random noise values\n",
        "y"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "colab": {
          "base_uri": "https://localhost:8080/"
        },
        "id": "1PnhhkpzPnTo",
        "outputId": "0cb743cd-ce5f-45c3-a024-3738d27bf691"
      },

              "        1.08186916,  1.00808299,  0.96550722,  0.9969586 ,  0.7777731 ,\n",
              "        0.93972447,  0.97903329,  1.06927795,  0.84444436,  0.78691378,\n",
              "        0.7858928 ,  0.89284405,  0.79647192,  0.67010986,  0.73124654,\n",
              "        0.64396483,  0.68312987,  0.46591562,  0.45124164,  0.39090671,\n",
              "        0.22829632,  0.34741444,  0.28589557,  0.20133508,  0.11766129])"
            ]

    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "def locally_weighted_regression(x_query, X_train, y_train, tau):\n",
        "    W = np.exp(-((X_train - x_query) ** 2) / (2 * tau ** 2))\n",
        "\n",
        "    X_bias = np.c_[np.ones_like(X_train), X_train] #concatenate arrays column-wise\n",
        "\n",
        "    theta = np.linalg.pinv(X_bias.T @ np.diag(W.ravel()) @ X_bias) @ X_bias.T @ np.diag(W.ravel()) @ y_train #Square matricesNon-square matricesSingular matrices\n",
        "    #np.linalg.pinv() computes the Moore-Penrose pseudoinverse of a matrix, which can be used to solve linear systems,\n",
        "    #particularly when the matrix is not invertible or not square.\n",
        "    #It's useful for tasks like least squares regression and handling singular or non-square matrices in numerical problems.\n",
        "\n",
        "    return np.array([1, x_query]) @ theta  # Predict y for x_query (1 × θ₀) + (x_query × θ₁) ŷ = θ₀ + θ₁ × x_query"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "id": "I0QuIM2OS40D"
      },
      "execution_count": null,
      "outputs": []
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "X_test = np.linspace(-3, 3, 100)\n",
        "y_pred = np.array([locally_weighted_regression(x, X, y, tau=0.5) for x in X_test])\n"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "id": "SXomUla9S_vl"
      },
      "execution_count": null,
      "outputs": []
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "plt.scatter(X, y, color=\"gray\", alpha=0.5, label=\"Training Data\")\n",
        "plt.plot(X_test, y_pred, color=\"red\", linewidth=2, label=\"LWR Fit (τ=0.5)\")\n",
        "plt.legend()\n",
        "plt.show()"
      ],
